name: codex-project-memory
description: Private, token-aware project memory with precise local recall, reviewable saves, source citations, and an offline knowledge graph.

interface.shortDescription: Private, token-aware memory with precise recall for Codex projects.
interface.longDescription: Precisely recall reviewed project decisions, conclusions, workflows, and evidence without loading every memory into context. Retrieval stays local and works within a clear token budget, while source validation, explicit save review, one-way project links, and the offline knowledge guide keep memory traceable and controlled.
defaultPrompt: Recall only the project memories relevant to this task within the default token budget.
Propose durable memories from the work we just finished.
Guide me through this project's saved knowledge and evidence.
